GET /v1/estimates/approve/{estimateId}.description: Marks an estimate as approved by the homeowner or agent, advancing it to the next workflow stage.

POST /v1/estimates/complete/{estimateId}.description: Marks an estimate as complete and triggers document generation and contract creation.

PATCH /v1/estimates/create-document/{est.description: Generates a PandaDoc document from an estimate for review and signing.

PATCH /v1/estimates/delete-contract/{est.description: Removes the PandaDoc contract associated with an estimate, allowing re-generation.

POST /v1/estimates/duplicate.description: Creates a copy of an existing estimate with all line items. The duplicate starts in draft status.

POST /v1/estimates/generation.description: Auto-generates an estimate using product catalog templates based on property condition and scope.

POST /v1/estimates/migrate-products.description: Internal migration — updates estimate line items to use the latest product catalog entries.

PATCH /v1/estimates/reset/{estimateId}.description: Resets an estimate back to draft status. Cleans up associated project scope and unlinks documents.

PATCH /v1/estimates/save/{estimateId}.description: Saves the current state of an estimate including line items, notes, and pricing without changing status.

POST /v1/estimates/search.description: Searches estimates by deal, status, date range, or other criteria. Returns paginated results.

PATCH /v1/estimates/send-for-signature/{.description: Sends the estimate document to the homeowner and agent for e-signature via PandaDoc.

POST /v1/estimates/sort-custom-products.description: Reorders custom (non-catalog) line items within an estimate.

POST /v1/estimates/sort-products.description: Reorders catalog line items within an estimate.

DELETE /v1/estimates/{estimateId}.description: Deletes an estimate. Only draft estimates can be deleted.

GET /v1/estimates/{estimateId}/proposal.description: Retrieves the formatted proposal view of an estimate for client presentation.

DELETE /v1/estimates/{estimateId}/{uid}.description: Removes a user's access to an estimate.

parameters.uid: Firebase UID of the user to remove.

POST /v1/follow-up-boss/activate.description: Activates the Follow Up Boss CRM integration for the authenticated account.

POST /v1/follow-up-boss/connect-users.description: Maps Revive platform users to their Follow Up Boss counterparts for data sync.

DELETE /v1/follow-up-boss/deactivate.description: Deactivates the Follow Up Boss CRM integration and stops data sync.

GET /v1/follow-up-boss/get-user-pipeline.description: Returns the pipeline configuration from the connected Follow Up Boss account.

GET /v1/follow-up-boss/logs.summary: Get Follow Up Boss sync logs
GET /v1/follow-up-boss/logs.description: Returns recent sync activity logs for the Follow Up Boss integration.

POST /v1/follow-up-boss/webhook.description: Handles incoming webhook events from Follow Up Boss for real-time data sync.

GET /v1/homes/{dealId}.description: Retrieves the home record associated with a deal.

PATCH /v1/homes/{dealId}.description: Updates the home record associated with a deal.

PUT /v1/homes/{dealId}/associate.description: Links a home record to a deal.

DELETE /v1/homes/{dealId}/associate.description: Removes the link between a home record and a deal.

POST /v1/homes/{dealId}/note.description: Adds a note to the home record associated with a deal.

POST /v1/marketing-center/automation/age.description: Triggers automated marketing material generation for an agent's listings.

POST /v1/marketing-center/automation/opp.description: Triggers automated marketing material generation for a specific opportunity.

POST /v1/marketing-center/automation/reb.description: Rebuilds all automated marketing materials, regenerating templates and assets.

POST /v1/marketing-center/create-image.description: Generates a custom marketing image (flyer, social post, etc.) from a template with property data.

GET /v1/marketing-center/download-counte.description: Returns the download count for a marketing asset.

GET /v1/marketing-center/generate-wrappe.description: Generates a year-end Wrapped-style summary report for agent marketing.

POST /v1/marketing-center/generate-wrapp.description: Handles async callback when a Wrapped report generation completes.

GET /v1/marketing-center/get-templates.description: Returns all available marketing templates with preview images and configuration.

POST /v1/marketing-center/rebuild-agent-.description: Regenerates all marketing templates for an agent with updated branding and property data.

POST /v1/marketing-center/send-mms.description: Sends a marketing MMS message with an image attachment to a recipient.

POST /v1/marketing-center/submit-templat.description: Submits a completed marketing template for review or publishing.

GET /v1/marketing-center/template/{id}.description: Retrieves a single marketing template by ID with configuration and preview.

POST /v1/marketing-center/webhook/create.description: Handles async callback when a marketing image generation completes.
